name: to-do
description: Date-routed daily to-do notes feeding SpaceDailyDashboard's tasks panel under spice/to-do/. v0.1.2: filename pattern <Name>-YYYY-MM-DD (filename_prefix "ToDo-") per v0.4.2 platform invariant. v0.2.0 MINOR (v0.58.0 FA-6): canonical-vocab adoption per Frontmatter Alignment. Template now emits type: "to-do" (was the ONE blueprint missing the canonical type discriminator per FA audit) + canonical created_at: (ISO+TZ; replaces legacy created:). Discriminator tag todo stripped; temporal YYYY/MM/DD tag stripped. NEW canonical-vocab rule_fragment (to-do had no rule fragments before).

post_install.message: To-do blueprint installed at spice/to-do/. REQUIRED: enable the Templater community plugin if not already enabled. Click '+ Today's To-Do' in the nav-button row to create today's file at spice/to-do/YYYY/MM-MMMM/YYYY-MM-DD-ToDo.md. Manual file creation in spice/to-do/ now also auto-applies the template (via Templater folder-template registration). Tasks added in today's file appear in the daily dashboard's Today's Tasks panel.
